raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 84 would limit educational opportunities for students and parents.",
    "AB 84 would defund charter schools and force students into state-run schools.",
    "AB 84 would create an anti-charter school czar appointed by the governor.",
    "AB 84 will reduce educational opportunities for children and prevent competitive alternatives for education.",
    "AB 84 expands government control and overreach, which is costly, unnecessary, and harmful to the viability of charter schools.",
    "AB 84 would strip away flexibility and limit individualized supports for students.",
    "AB 84 would ignore the proven power of parent-teacher-community collaboration in student growth.",
    "AB 84 would impose a mountain of red tape on nonclassroom-based charter schools.",
    "AB 84 would put unnecessary bureaucratic burdens on successful charter schools.",
    "AB 84 would harm the most vulnerable California students."
  ]
}
```
